manifest.author: iamzainnnn
manifest.changelog:
V34.1 — Changelogs

- Resolved an issue causing the keyboard to dismiss unexpectedly in DMs.
- Added a long-press theme picker in DMs for quicker customization.
- Enhanced the immersive blur effect in Stories for a smoother visual experience.
- Fixed inconsistencies with notification icons.
- Introduced Game Hub in the profile section.
- Addressed issues with likes visibility nudge behavior.
- Fixed inaccuracies in the unread message counter badge.
- Improved overall app stability by resolving multiple ANR issues and memory leaks across Reels, Stories, DMs, and media components.
- Applied additional internal optimizations for better performance and reliability.
manifest.name: Zain's Backup
manifest.description: This backup maked for the newest features!
